title: Add (skopeo generate-sigstore-key)
body:
Depends on unmerged https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1810 , missing documentation - see FIXMEs

@vrothberg PTAL.

comments.body:
Now vendors a merged c/image commit, and includes a man page.

Ready for review and possible merging.
Sorry about that, the script doesn’t run on macOS. It is passing now.
